productDisplayName: Nike Women Pink Snapper Flip Flops
description: One look at these flip flops and your feet are bound to sigh with the pleasure of relaxation. The nike Snapper thongs are designed keeping in mind absolute cushioned comfort to relax your feet and offer a comfortable ride.  Upper Synthetic leather thong straps with a toe separator and a padded fabric inner lining to lock the foot in place with easeEmbroidered nike swoosh logo on the lateral strapCushioned phylon footbed in dual tone with a Nike swoosh logo for all-day comfort and styleOutsole TPR outsole with strategically placed lugs for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces  shoe care Remove dust and dirt with damp, clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
